chat_history.speaker: Agent
chat_history.message: Welcome to Vetsource support. My name is Alex. How can I assist you with your account today?

chat_history.speaker: Customer
chat_history.message: Hi Alex, I got a notification that my monthly order failed. I need to switch to a new credit card.

chat_history.speaker: Agent
chat_history.message: I'd be happy to take care of that for you. For your security, our system encrypts details automatically. Go ahead and type your new card number whenever you're ready.

chat_history.speaker: Agent
chat_history.message: Got it. And what is the expiration date and the 3-digit security code on the back?

chat_history.speaker: Customer
chat_history.message: Exp is 08/29 and the code is 456

chat_history.speaker: Agent
chat_history.message: Excellent. That card has gone through successfully, and I've manually re-run the failed order for you. It's now processing!

chat_history.speaker: Customer
chat_history.message: Awesome, thanks so much for the quick help.

chat_history.speaker: Agent
chat_history.message: You're very welcome! Thanks for choosing Vetsource, and have a great rest of your evening.
